text.title: TTS Implementation — Routing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Delegate to tts-basics synthesize(). TTSService chunking overhead is unjustified for short payloads. Cache key still includes provider.
Return cached path + chunks index. Skip synth. Still run eviction at end to keep total size under cap.

branch.when: char_count > 4000 AND cache_hit == false AND delivery == 'stream'

conclusion.verdict: Use stream_tts() async generator. Bridge to sync via asyncio.run(collect_stream()). Never call stream_to_file from inside async without to_thread().

branch.when: char_count > 4000 AND cache_hit == false AND delivery == 'file' AND voice_mode == 'clone' AND consent_record_present == false

conclusion.verdict: Reject: return status="error", error="missing consent". Do NOT call clone_voice. Surface to human for consent collection.

branch.when: char_count > 4000 AND cache_hit == false AND delivery == 'file' AND voice_mode == 'clone' AND consent_record_present == true

conclusion.verdict: Proceed with ElevenLabs clone_voice. Attach consent_id to output. Cache key uses cloned voice_id.

branch.when: char_count > 4000 AND cache_hit == false AND delivery == 'file' AND voice_mode == 'library'

conclusion.verdict: Standard long-form path: tempfile.mkdtemp() → semantic_split() → parallel synth → assemble → cache → evict. Apply rule r4 split discipline.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
